messages.content: I'm opening LinkedIn for you. You should see it now.
tell me about today's IPL match

I'm checking the latest cricket updates. Today is Sunday, April 12, 2026, and I found that there are matches scheduled in the Indian Premier League. However, I don't have real-time information on the current match. Let me check the latest sports news. Unfortunately, I couldn't find the latest information on today's IPL match. I recommend checking the official IPL website or a sports news website for the latest updates.
darvaja Band karvana Hai Ki Nahin

Rudra, aapne darvaja band karne ke bare mein pucha, agar aap ghar ke andar hain aur aapko lagta hai ki darvaja band hona chahiye, to haan, darvaja band karna chahiye, lekin agar aapke ghar mein koi aur vyakti hai jo bahar jaana chahta hai, to darvaja band nahi karna chahiye.
HTML Run Karenge Kyon Lage the

Maine dekha ki aapne mujhe HTML code chalane ke liye kaha tha, lekin maine use ek single HTML file mein compile kar diya tha, jisse aap use easily run kar sakte hain. Ab aap use apne browser mein open karke run kar sakte hain.
